sigWerErrors.reason: 'sao' (why/how) and 'sáu' (six) are completely different in meaning; this changes the intent of the sentence.
Adding 'trăm' (hundred) changes the number from 'bốn hai bốn' (424) to 'bốn trăm hai mươi bốn' (424), but the structure is different. However, the meaning (the number 424) is preserved.
Adding 'mươi' (tens) is part of the Vietnamese way to say 424 as 'bốn trăm hai mươi bốn', which is equivalent to 'bốn hai bốn'. The meaning is preserved.
Adding 'trăm' (hundred) in 'bốn trăm lẻ bốn' changes the structure but still refers to 404, which is the same as 'bốn không bốn'.
